what_works: Monochrome base with subtle colour pops, serif/sans pairing for drama, design-tool aesthetic (dashed borders, corner handles), extreme whitespace, 96px hero heading, playful interactive details, minimap sidebar

elements.hero: Massive typography, centred, no image needed
elements.content: Card-based with dashed selection borders and corner dots
elements.colour: Grey-scale with one accent used very sparingly
elements.typography: Display serif for headings, geometric sans for body, tight tracking on large text
elements.interaction: Drag gestures, hover reveals with backdrop blur, scroll-triggered content

what_works: Instrument Serif for headings, 12-column CSS Grid with breakout regions for full-width moments, fluid clamp() typography, dark/light theme toggle, accordion animations with cubic-bezier easing, full-width hero slider with manual navigation
best_for: Lifestyle brands, boutique retail, premium small businesses

elements.nav: Minimal top bar with dark/light variant, hamburger menu
elements.hero: Full-width image slider with editorial serif overlay text
elements.content: Split-grid layouts alternating image and text, breakout regions
elements.colour: Restrained palette with dark and light theme states
elements.typography: Instrument Serif headings, system sans body, fluid sizing via clamp()
elements.interaction: Smooth accordion expand/collapse (400ms cubic-bezier), hover effects on footer links

what_works: Numbered portfolio sections (01, 02, 03) create editorial structure, minimalist dark aesthetic, capitalized bold tagline as hero, clean information hierarchy, prefetch optimisation for snappy navigation
best_for: Creative agencies, production companies, service businesses with strong portfolio

elements.nav: Toggle menu with minimal chrome, high contrast
elements.hero: Typography-led hero with capitalised statement, no hero image needed
elements.content: Numbered portfolio grid with thumbnail carousel, hierarchical sections
elements.colour: Dark base with high contrast text, minimal accent
elements.typography: Bold sans-serif for statements, clean hierarchy through size and weight
elements.interaction: Prefetch on link hover for instant navigation, back-to-top anchor

what_works: Official Next.js View Transitions demo showing shared element morphing, Suspense reveals, directional navigation slides, and same-route crossfades -- all using React ViewTransition component with no animation libraries
best_for: Technical reference for implementing page transitions in Next.js 16.2+

elements.nav: Anchored header that stays fixed during page transitions
elements.hero: Photo grid with thumbnail-to-hero morph animation
elements.content: Gallery grid with photographer tabs using crossfade transitions
elements.colour: Clean neutral palette focused on showcasing the transition effects
elements.interaction: Shared element morph, directional slide (forward/back), skeleton-to-content reveal, tab crossfade

what_works: Comprehensive collection of CSS scroll-driven animation demos using animation-timeline: scroll() and view(). All examples are CSS-only with no JavaScript, showcasing progress bars, parallax, reveal animations, and sticky headers
best_for: Technical reference for replacing AOS.js/GSAP ScrollTrigger with native CSS scroll animations

elements.typography: Monospace for code, clean sans for labels
elements.interaction: Every demo is scroll-driven using only CSS animation-timeline property
